name: Bara Bara no Mi
description: Allows the user to split their body into independently controllable parts and become immune to cutting attacks, making them a Splitting Human.

name: Sube Sube no Mi
description: Allows the user to have an incredibly smooth, frictionless body that makes physical attacks and objects slide off, making them a Slippery Human.

name: Bomu Bomu no Mi
description: Allows the user to make any part of their body explode, making them a Explosive Human.

name: Kiro Kiro no Mi
description: Allows the user to manipulate the weight of themselves, increasing or decreasing mass at will, making them a Weight-Warping Human.

name: Hana Hana no Mi
description: Allows the user to sprout extra body parts from any surface, making them a Multiplied Human.

name: Doru Doru no Mi
description: Allows the user to create and manipulate wax to mold their body or objects at will, making them a Candle Human.

name: Baku Baku no Mi
description: Allows the user to devour and merge with objects to gain their properties, making them a Voracious Human.

name: Mane Mane no Mi
description: Allows the user to mimic the appearance and voice of anyone they touch, making them an Imitating Human.

name: Supa Supa no Mi
description: Allows the user to transform parts of their body into sharp, metallic blades, making them a Full-Body Bladed Human.

name: Toge Toge no Mi
description: Allows the user to sprout and control spikes or thorns from their body, making them a Spike Human.

name: Ori Ori no Mi
description: Allows the user to bind and restrain targets by generating unbreakable chains or bindings, making them a Binding Human.

name: Bane Bane no Mi
description: Allows the user to bounce and propel themselves by converting parts of their body into springs, making them a Spring Human.

name: Ito Ito no Mi (Awakened)
description: Allows the user to produce and control thin, strong strings to manipulate objects and people, making them a String Human.

name: Noro Noro no Mi
description: Allows the user to emit beams which temporarily slow down their target, making them a Noroma Human.

name: Doa Doa no Mi
description: Allows the user to create doors through anything they touch, making them a Door Human.

name: Awa Awa no Mi
description: Allows the user to emit and control soap and bubbles that can not only clean off dirt but can also clean off power, making them a Soap Human.

name: Beri Beri no Mi
description: allows the user to transform their body parts into a multitude of berry-like balls, making them a Grape Human.

name: Sabi Sabi no Mi
description: Allows the user to cause metallic items to rust and break, making them a Rust Human.

name: Shari Shari no Mi
description: Allows the user to rotate their body parts like wheels making them a Wheel Human.

name: Horo Horo no Mi
description: Allows the user to conjure ghost, making them a Ghost Human.

name: Yomi Yomi no Mi
description: Allows the user to resurrect after their first death and use several other soul-based abilities, making them a Reviving Human.

name: Kage Kage no Mi
description: Alows the user to manifest and control shadows of living creatures as tangible forms, making them a Ruler of Shadows.

name: Nikyu Nikyu no Mi
description: Allows the user to repel anything via paws, making them a Paw Human.

name: Toshi Toshi no Mi
description: Allows the user to manipulate the ages of people or objects, making them a Age Manipulation Human.

name: Jiki Jiki no Mi (Awakened)
description: Allows the user to create magnetic forces and use them to control metal, making them a Metal Human.

name: Ope Ope no Mi (Awakened)
description: Allows the user to create spherical domains, inside of which the user can freely rearrange, dismantle and remodel anything and anyone, making them a Free Modification Human.

name: Shiro Shiro no Mi
description: Alows the user to become a living fortress, making them a Castle Human.

name: Unnamed Paramecia
description: Allows the user to convert damage inflicted onto him into physical strenght, making them a ??? Human.

name: Wara Wara no Mi
description: Allows the user to create and manipulate straw at will, with the straw having damage-redirecting properties, making them a Straw Human.

name: Oto Oto no Mi
description: Allows the user to transform parts of their body into musical instruments and play music with a variety of destructive effects, making them a Music Human.

name: Mero Mero no Mi
description: Allows the user to make a range of attacks which use emotions of love, lust or adoration to transform opponents into stone, making them a Love Human.

name: Doku Doku no Mi
description: Allows the user to produce and control different types of poison, as well as granting immunity to all of them, making them a Poison Human.

name: Horu Horu no Mi
description: Allows the user to create a variety of special hormones that can alter the recipient's body in any way the user desires, making them a Hormone Controlling Human.

name: Choki Choki no Mi
description: Allows the user to transform parts of their body into scissors and cut solid objects as if they were papper, making them a Scissors Human.

name: Kira Kira no Mi
description: Allows the user to transform their body into diamond, making them a Diamond Human.

name: Poke Poke no Mi
description: Allows the user to create pockets on their body with infinite storage, making them a Pocket Human.

name: Woshu Woshu no Mi
description: Allows the user to literally wash and hang out to dry people and objects as if they were clothes, making them a Laundry Human.

name: Fuwa Fuwa no Mi
description: Allows the user to levitate themselves and non-living things into the air, making them a Levitating Human.

name: Deka Deka no Mi
description: Allows the user to drastically enlarge their body, making them a Gigantification Human.

name: Gura Gura no Mi
description: Allows the user to create vibrations or quakes, making them a Tremor Human.

name: Mato Mato no Mi
description: Allows the user to mark any target with their hands and later aim at them any object, from any location and at any time, making them a Mark Human.

name: Soru Soru no Mi
description: Allows the user to manipulate and interact with souls, making them a Soul Human.

name: Fuku Fuku no Mi
description: Allows the user to create clothing and other apparel out of leaves or stones by visualizing them, making them a Clothes Human.

name: Hobi Hobi no Mi
description: Allows the user to transform living people into toys, and erase memories of their existence from others, making them a Toy Human.

name: Buki Buki no Mi
description: Allows the user to change their body parts into any weapon, making them a Full-Body Weapon Human.

name: Guru Guru no Mi
description: Allows the user to transform any part of their body or piece of worn clothing into propellers capable of rotating at high speed, making them a Rotation Human.

name: Beta Beta no Mi
description: Allows the to create and control mucus, making them a Mucus Human.

name: Zushi Zushi no Mi
description: Allows the user to create and manipulate gravitational force, making them a Gravity Human.

name: Bari Bari no Mi
description: Allows the user to generate barriers, making them a Barrier Human.

name: Nui Nui no Mi
description: Allows the user to stitch things together and un-stitch them like if nothing had happened, making them a Stitch Human.

name: Giro Giro no Mi
description: Allows the user to see through everything and read the minds of others, making them a Insight Human.

name: Ato Ato no Mi
description: Allows the user to turn people or objects into abstract art, making them a Art Human.

name: Jake Jake no Mi
description: Alows the user to become a jacket and be worn by others, making them a Jacket Human.

name: Pamu Pamu no Mi
description: Allows the user to cause their own body or any inorganic object they touch to rupture and explode, making them a Puncture Human.

name: Sui Sui no Mi
description: Allows the user to swim in ground or walls, making them a Free-Swimming Human.

name: Ton Ton no Mi
description: Allows the user to increase their weight, making them a Super Weight Human.

name: Hira Hira no Mi
description: Allows the user to make their body and any object they touch become flat and flexible, letting solid objects ripple, billow, and flutter like a flag, making them a Flag Human.

name: Ishi Ishi no Mi
description: Allows the user to merge with and manipulate stone, making them a Stone Assimilation Human.

name: Chiyu Chiyu no Mi
description: Allows the user to heal any wound through the use of liquid that comes from the user's body, such as tears, making them a Healing Human.

name: Maki Maki no Mi
description: Allows the user to create and control scrolls at will, which have special properties including storing objects and generating drawings, making them a Scroll Human.

name: Mira Mira no Mi
description: Allows the user to create mirrors which can reflect attacks or appearances, making them a Mirror Human.

name: Pero Pero no Mi
description: Allows the user to create and manipulate candy at will, making them a Candy Human.

name: Bisu Bisu no Mi
description: Allows the user to generate and manipulate biscuits at will, making them a Biscuit Human.

name: Bata Bata no Mi
description: Allows the user to create and control butter, making them a Butter Human.

name: Buku Buku no Mi
description: Allows the user to manipulate books, making them a Book Human.

name: Kuri Kuri no Mi
description: Allows the user to create and manipulate cream at will, making them a Cream Human.

name: Shibo Shibo no Mi
description: Allows the user to drain liquid from both living and non-living things by wringing them, as well as absorb liquid into themselves and their weapons, making them a Dehydration Human.

name: Memo Memo no Mi
description: Allows the user to turn people's memories into strips of film and manipulate them, making them a Memory Human.

name: Mochi Mochi no Mi (Awakened)
description: Allows the user to create and control mochi at will, making them a Mochi Human.

name: Hoya Hoya no Mi
description: Allows the user to summon a genie from their body, making them a Lamp Human.

name: Netsu Netsu no Mi
description: Allows the user to emanate heat from their body, making them a High Heat Human.

name: Kuku Kuku no Mi
description: Allows the user to turn objects into food, making them a Cooking Human.

name: Gocha Gocha no Mi
description: Allows the user to merge themselves with other people, making them a Merge Human.

name: Oshi Oshi no Mi
description: Allows the user to freely move and shape the ground as tough it was malleable like clay, making them a Sculpting Human.

name: Kobu Kobu no Mi
description: Allows the user to encourage and rally other people to awaken their latent potential, making them an Encouraging Human.

name: Kibi Kibi no Mi
description: Allows the user to create dango from their cheeks that can tame animals and those of part-animal nature for 1 month, making them a Taming Human.

name: Juku Juku no Mi
description: Allows the user to mature and decay anything they touch, making them a Decay Human.

name: Suke Suke no Mi
description: Allows the user to turn themselves and whatever they touch invisible, making them a Clear Human.

name: Shiku Shiku no Mi
description: Allows the user to afflict others with diseases, making them a Disease Human.

name: Wapu Wapu no Mi
description: Allows the user to teleport themselves and others from place to place, making them a Teleporting Human.

name: Riki Riki no Mi
description: Allows the user to have incredible strenght, making them a Strong Human.

name: Shima Shima no Mi
description: Allows the user to merge with an island's environment and manipulate it, making them an Island Human.

name: Gabu Gabu no Mi
description: Details of what abilities this devil fruit grants are currently unknown. It makes the user a Liquor Human.

name: Muchi Muchi no Mi
description: Allows the user to use whips to command anything they hit, making them a Training Human.

name: Nori Nori no Mi
description: Allows the user to control anything they ride, making them a Driving Human.

name: Tsutsu Tsutsu no Mi
description: Allows the user to transform their head into a cannon, making them a Cannon Human.

name: Iku Iku no Mi
description: Allows the user to make inanimate objects in their care grow larger as though they were living organisms, making them a Nurturing Human.

name: Aro Aro no Mi
description: Allows the user to generate and control vectorial arrows capable of manipulation motion and its properties, making them an Arrow Human.

name: Iba Iba no Mi
description: Allows the user to generate thorns from his targets when someone touches them. The stronger the love for the target, the more painful the thorns are, making them a Thorn Human.

name: Nagi Nagi no Mi
description: Allows the user to create a soundproof field and to cancel all noises, making them a Soundless Human.

name: Toki Toki no Mi
description: Allows the user to send themselves and others forward in time, making them a Time Travelling Human.

name: Fude Fude no Mi
description: Allows the user to generate ink from their body and use a painting brush to turn images created with that ink into real, lifelike objects, making them a Drawing Human.

name: Nomi Nomi no Mi
description: Allows the user's brain to expand indefinitely with new knowledge, making them a Brains Human.

name: Moku Moku no Mi
description: Allows the user to create, control and transform into smoke at will, making them a Smoke Human.

name: Suna Suna no Mi
description: Allows the user to create, control and transform into sand at will, making them a Sand Human.

name: Goro Goro no Mi
description: Allows the user to create, control and transform into Lightning at will, making them a Lightning Human.

name: Hie Hie no Mi
description: Allows the user to create, control and transform into ice at will, making them a Freezing Human.

name: Yami Yami no Mi
description: Allows the user to create, control and transform into darkness at will, making them a Darkness Human.

name: Pika Pika no Mi
description: Allows the user to create, control and transform into light at will, making them a Light Human.

name: Magu Magu no Mi
description: Allows the user to create, control and transform into magma at will, making them a Magma Human.

name: Susu Susu no Mi
description: Allows the user to create, control and transform into soot at will, making them a Soot Human.

name: Numa Numa no Mi
description: Allows the user to create, control and transform into mud at will, making them a Swamp Human.

name: Gasu Gasu no Mi
description: Allows the user to create, control and transform into gas at will, making them a Gas Human.

name: Mera Mera no Mi
description: Allows the user to create, control and transform into fire at will, making them a Fire Human.

name: Mori Mori no Mi
description: Allows the user to create, control and transform into flora at will, making them a Forest Human.

name: Yuki Yuki no Mi
description: Allows the user to create, control and transform into snow at will, making them a Snow Human.

name: Gunyo Gunyo no Mi
description: Unknown-type Devil Fruit that allows the user to create and control clay, making them a Clay Human.

name: Unnamed Devil Fruit in Panda Shark's posession
description: Unknown-type Devil Fruit in the posession of a Panda Shark from Hatchan's Cover Story
